rulings.Case Title: KATHY A. PIPPINS VS. ESTATE OF CHRISTINE EILEEN YOUNG, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF KATHY PIPPINS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment continued to August 9, 2019. By no later than July 23, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. Defendant shall properly file his opposition. It appears that the opposition has been served and has been improperly submitted for filing via drop-box at the window. This action is subject to mandatory e-filing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OFELIA MUNGUIA ET AL VS. ARTURO RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT ALMA VALENZUELA Notice Of Motion To Set Aside GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant to file her answer no later than July 23, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OFELIA MUNGUIA ET AL VS. ARTURO RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT ARTURO RODRIGUEZ Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside OFF CALENDAR, no valid proof of service on file. Proof of service submitted with the motion and dated June 20, 2019 is executed by Francisco Javier Aldana stating under the penalty of perjury that he is not a party to this action. The complaint and the demurrer filed by Franciso Javier Aldana on April 22, 2019 indicate that Fransico Janiver Aldana is a defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OFELIA MUNGUIA ET AL VS. ARTURO RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO ALDANA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend. As an initial matter, allegations regarding a forged will are incorporated into each cause of action. The matter of the validity of the will cannot be properly addressed in this proceeding and shall be addressed in the pending probate case. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to properly allege facts, not conclusions (See Complaint, paragraph 6), establishing that Jesus and/or Ofelia are successors in interest to each of the two decedents, Jose and Carlos, estates. Demurrer is further sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of causes of action for misrepresentation and concealment as to the moving defendant, including but no limited to a duty to disclose, reasonable reliance and detriment caused by such reasonable reliance. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: YEUNG PO YUEN VS. WEST COAST SERVING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Osc Re: Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction To Bar 07/23/19 Trustee'S Sale
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 3. Osc Re: Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction To Bar 07/23/19 Trustee'S Sale OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION VS. ROBERT KINANN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT ROBERT KINANN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain his burden. This action was to resume upon the conclusion of bankruptcy case. Bankruptcy case was concluded, but Defendant failed to take steps to respond to this action. No requisite factual showing for relief is presented. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SOO YOUNG OH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT SOO YOUNG OH, JIN MYUNG OH DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SELMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ATALEN, LLC VS. JACKIE LONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT JACKIE LONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY LA ROCCA VS. JORGE ALVARADO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 23, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT JORGE ALVARADO, JORGE ALVARADO, DAMARIS ROMERO, LAURA MAGANA, GUSTAVO CUBILLO, WILLIAM CUBILLO, JENNY CUBILLO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with payment requirements under SFRO. See also Cal. Civ. Code 3110(d). = (501/CFH)
